paper_title: Radiocarbon Age Calibration and Projection Methods

methods.description: Recalibration of conventional 14C ages of planktonic foraminifera to calendar ages using the IntCal09/Marine09 calibration curve and CALIB 6.0 software, with adjustments for current-regime dependent reservoir age corrections.

steps.description: Conventional 14C ages of planktonic foraminifera were recalculated to calendar ages based on the IntCal09/Marine09 calibration curve using the CALIB 6.0 software.
steps.searchable_summary: Recalculate 14C ages to calendar ages using IntCal09/Marine09 calibration curve and CALIB 6.0

steps.description: Applied a current-regime dependent reservoir age correction (DR) of 415 ± 105 yr before 10.6 ka, based on Holocene DR values in the Oyashio current off the Kuril islands.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply reservoir age correction based on current regime

steps.description: Linearly interpolated DR values from 415 yr to 130 yr at 3.5 ka, assuming mixing of 65% Tsugaru current water with a modern DR of 34 ± 42 yr and 35% Oyashio current water.
steps.searchable_summary: Interpolate DR values based on mixing ratios of currents

methods.description: Calculation of age-corrected radiocarbon contents (D14C) of benthic foraminifera, including interpolation of growth ages and estimation of analytical uncertainties.

steps.description: Age-corrected radiocarbon contents (D14C) of benthic foraminifera were calculated following the conventions of Stuiver and Polach.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate age-corrected D14C for benthic foraminifera

steps.description: Linearly interpolated between age control points to yield growth ages of the benthic foraminifera.
steps.searchable_summary: Interpolate growth ages between age control points

steps.description: Applied additional errors to interpolated calendar ages defined as the 1s standard deviations of the distances between age control points and the regression line.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply additional errors to interpolated ages based on standard deviations

methods.description: Method to deduce ventilation ages by projecting core site D14C values back along a closed-system 14C trajectory to the intersection with the IntCal09 atmospheric D14C curve.

steps.description: Projected core site D14C values back along a closed-system 14C trajectory to the intersection point with the IntCal09 atmospheric D14C curve.
steps.searchable_summary: Project D14C values to intersect with IntCal09 curve

steps.description: Determined the projection age relative to the surface ocean in the source regions by subtracting the average reservoir age of primary source regions.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate projection age relative to surface ocean
